notes: Harness tooling source repo ships no PHI itself, BUT the wall (hooks/outward-guard.js) reads this profile to scan outbound payloads — kept at hipaa so the repo's own PHI-egress protection stays hot (maintainers handle MBI/customer data) and the test suite (which encodes hipaa-level wall behavior) stays green. Confirmed by maintainer 2026-06-25 after 'none' disabled PHI scanning + broke the gate. 'secrets' class always enforced. Baseline redaction-scan flags only synthetic MRN/DOB fixtures in test/ (source files, never outbound).
